samples.puell: At today's level (11th percentile of the 365-day plan window (accruing daily)), BTC's forward 21-day return has historically averaged +0.1% (median -0.2%, up 48% of the time, n=63).
samples.nupl: At today's level (4th percentile of 2010-present (Coin Metrics twin)), BTC's forward 21-day return has historically averaged +4.7% (median +2.8%, up 60% of the time, n=817).
